narrative:
Township Marion township has 4,220 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.2 percentage points.
